channel.title: GitHub Swift Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: github/CopilotForXcode
item.description: Xcode extension for GitHub Copilot

item.title: RevenueCat/purchases-ios
item.description: In-app purchases and subscriptions made easy. Support for iOS, watchOS, tvOS, macOS, and visionOS.

item.title: seemoo-lab/openhaystack
item.description: Build your own 'AirTags' 🏷 today! Framework for tracking personal Bluetooth devices via Apple's massive Find My network.

item.title: Whisky-App/Whisky
item.description: A modern Wine wrapper for macOS built with SwiftUI

item.title: sindresorhus/KeyboardShortcuts
item.description: ⌨️ Add user-customizable global keyboard shortcuts (hotkeys) to your macOS app in minutes

item.title: apple/swift-openapi-generator
item.description: Generate Swift client and server code from an OpenAPI document.

item.title: mrousavy/react-native-vision-camera
item.description: 📸 A powerful, high-performance React Native Camera library.

item.title: whoeevee/EeveeSpotify
item.description: A tweak to get Spotify Premium for free, just like Spotilife

item.title: macmade/Hot
item.description: Hot is macOS menu bar application that displays the CPU speed limit due to thermal issues.

item.title: quoid/userscripts
item.description: An open-source userscript manager for Safari

item.title: khcrysalis/Feather
item.description: Feather is a free on-device iOS application manager/installer, using certificates part of the Apple Developer Program.

item.title: utmapp/UTM
item.description: Virtual machines for iOS and macOS

item.title: aws-samples/amazon-bedrock-client-for-mac
item.description: A sleek and powerful macOS client for Amazon Bedrock, bringing AI models to your desktop

item.title: home-assistant/iOS
item.description: 📱 Home Assistant for Apple platforms

item.title: altstoreio/AltStore
item.description: AltStore is an alternative app store for non-jailbroken iOS devices.

item.title: vapor/vapor
item.description: 💧 A server-side Swift HTTP web framework.

item.title: ChartsOrg/Charts
item.description: Beautiful charts for iOS/tvOS/OSX! The Apple side of the crossplatform MPAndroidChart.

item.title: ReactiveX/RxSwift
item.description: Reactive Programming in Swift

item.title: argmaxinc/WhisperKit
item.description: On-device Speech Recognition for Apple Silicon

item.title: onevcat/Kingfisher
item.description: A lightweight, pure-Swift library for downloading and caching images from the web.

item.title: SwifterSwift/SwifterSwift
item.description: A handy collection of more than 500 native Swift extensions to boost your productivity.

item.title: groue/GRDB.swift
item.description: A toolkit for SQLite databases, with a focus on application development

item.title: EhPanda-Team/EhPanda
item.description: An unofficial E-Hentai App for iOS built with SwiftUI & TCA.
